vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate based on visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2 (Mexican Mint) is absent/bare soil. P3 (Pothos) is present but struggling. P4 (Silver Guest) is absent.

plant_audit.P1: Empty yellow pot; no vegetative matter detected.
plant_audit.P2: Empty black pot; no vegetative matter detected.
plant_audit.P3: Single Pothos leaf remaining; shows signs of chlorosis and dehydration. The white rabbit anchor is present.
plant_audit.P4: No evidence of the 'Silver Guest' specimen.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears consistently dark and potentially waterlogged or lacking aeration.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in P3; electronic component (IC/chip) observed on the desk surface in earlier frames, removed in later frames.
biome_observations.anomalies: The presence of eggshells suggests an amateur attempt at soil amendment/fertilization.

temporal_deltas.T-2_to_Current: Significant decline; lighting conditions have degraded, making observation difficult, but the Pothos leaf appears to have lost structural integrity or is obscured by low light.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical decline. The lack of visible growth in P1, P2, and P4 indicates total failure of those specimens. P3 is the only surviving element, currently in a state of high stress.
anomalies: Electronic component (IC) on desk surface (T-5 to T-3)
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is failing. The registry provided does not match the physical reality of the desk, where three of the four pots are effectively empty. The single Pothos leaf in P3 is the only remaining biological indicator, and it is under significant environmental stress. The presence of eggshells suggests an unscientific intervention that has not yielded positive results.
